package rulefixtures

import (
	proto "google.golang.org/protobuf/proto"
)

// scenario for proto_unmarshal_same_payload_multiple_times: The same local protobuf payload binding is unmarshaled into multiple targets in one function.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: mod; severity: contextual.
func scenario433Positive(payload []byte, first proto.Message, second proto.Message) error {
	if err := proto.Unmarshal(payload, first); err != nil {
		return err
	}
	return proto.Unmarshal(payload, second)
}
